name: instant-provisioner — circuit breaker OPEN (backend down, fail-fast active)
description: P1 page. instant_provisioner_circuit_state{backend} reports the per-backend (postgres / redis / mongo / nats) circuit-breaker state: 0=CLOSED (healthy), 1=HALF_OPEN (probing), 2=OPEN (fail-fast). A sustained OPEN means the provisioner has stopped attempting calls to that backend after N consecutive failures and is failing all provision requests fast with a clear error so the api can render `agent_action: "retry after the backend is restored"`. This is BETTER than a hung call, but the customer flow is still degraded. Runbook: check the backend's own /healthz, kubectl logs the upstream pod (postgres-customers / redis-provision / mongodb / nats), and decide whether to roll back, restart, or wait for the half-open probe to close the breaker. Source: provisioner/internal/circuit/circuit.go (ProvisionerCircuitState gauge).

nrql.query: SELECT latest(instant_provisioner_circuit_state) FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_provisioner_circuit_state' FACET backend
